title: Release Reconciliation, Incident Response, and Production Defense · Runtime Contract: Feed Go Release Chain
summary: The team has many passing checks but cannot bind source to artifact, explain feed loss, prove publisher respect, restore service, or identify residual risks. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go release chain increment in defensible production Go feed aggregator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case p…
objectives: Bind reviewed revision, generated code, migrations, dependency graph, tests, image digest, SBOM, signature, configuration, and deployment identity.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

checks.description: The cumulative go portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker // Evidence: feed-go-release-chain-2hz0cv.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: feed-go-release-chain-2hz0cv(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?func\s+evidence_feed_go_release_chain_2hz0cv\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\(bool,\s*int,\s*string\)\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?releaseGates < 20)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?passedGates != releaseGates)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?rehearsedIncidents < 10)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?openCriticalRisks > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using bind and reviewed plus specific case evidence.
